# VeriWorkly Resume Builder

Free, open-source, and privacy-first resume builder. Create professional ATS-friendly resumes with flexible templates, real-time preview, and complete data privacy.

## Details
- **Website**: https://veriworkly.com
- **Tagline**: Free resume builder. No login. 100% private.
- **Creator**: Gautam Raj
- **Source Code**: https://github.com/Gautam25Raj/veriworkly-resume

## Key Features
- **No Login Required**: Start building immediately without creating an account.
- **Privacy First**: Data stays on your device (stored in local browser storage).
- **ATS-Friendly**: Templates designed to pass through Applicant Tracking Systems.
- **Real-time Preview**: See changes instantly as you type.
- **Modern Templates**: Multiple professional designs to choose from.

## For AI Agents
This site is designed to be easily readable by LLMs and agents. It uses semantic HTML and structured JSON-LD data. Our API is RESTful and documented using Fumadocs.

### API Endpoints (v1)
Base URL: `https://api.veriworkly.com/api/v1` (or local equivalent)

#### System & Health
- `GET /health`: Basic health check of the API server and dependencies.
- `GET /github/stats`: Get GitHub repository metrics.
- `GET /github/issues`: Get open GitHub issues for contributions.

#### Resumes (Requires Auth)
- `GET /resumes`: List all resumes for the authenticated user.
- `GET /resumes/:resumeId`: Get specific resume data.
- `PUT /resumes/:resumeId/sync`: Sync resume content to the server.

#### Profiles (Requires Auth)
- `GET /profiles/master`: Get the user's master profile.
- `PUT /profiles/master`: Update the user's master profile.

#### Share Links
- `GET /shares/resumes/:resumeId`: List share links (Auth required).
- `POST /shares/resumes/:resumeId`: Create a share link (Auth required).
- `DELETE /shares/resumes/:resumeId/links/:shareLinkId`: Revoke link (Auth required).
- `GET /share-links/:token`: Retrieve a public resume via secure token.
- `POST /share-links/:token/verify`: Verify a public share link's validity.

#### Exports
- `POST /exports/resumes/:resumeId/jobs`: Queue a private export (Auth required).
- `POST /exports/resumes/:resumeId/direct`: Direct synchronous export (Auth required).
- `POST /exports/shares/:token/jobs`: Queue a public export using a share token.
- `GET /exports/jobs/:jobId`: Get private job status.
- `GET /exports/jobs/:jobId/download`: Download private exported artifact.
- `GET /exports/shares/:token/jobs/:jobId`: Get public job status.
- `GET /exports/shares/:token/jobs/:jobId/download`: Download public artifact.

#### Roadmap
- `GET /roadmap`: List public roadmap items.
- `GET /roadmap/stats`: Get roadmap statistics.

#### Users (Requires Auth)
- `GET /users/me`: Get current user details.
- `PUT /users/me/name`: Update user display name.

## Technology Stack
- **Frontend**: Next.js (App Router), TailwindCSS v4, TypeScript, Fumadocs.
- **Backend**: Node.js, Express, Prisma, Redis.
- **Authentication**: Better-Auth.
- **Storage**: PostgreSQL.
